notes: AI-generated fake NV card (LN: VALDEZ, FN: SOPHIA, ID: 5242912532, address 7075 SIERRA STREET, RENO NV 89501, ISS 03/01/2023, EXP 07/31/1999, HGT 5'-06", WGT 152, EYES BRO, SEX F). Front only — no back image available. Source filename indicates AI synthesis ('nevada_generated.photos_v3'). Critical structural violations that map cleanly to hint IDs: (1) B.1: card header reads 'NEVADA IDENTIFICATION CARD' not 'DRIVER LICENSE' — these images are state ID cards being evaluated against the DL-specific hint page, so the wording check legitimately fails. (2) E.5: EXP date 07/31/1999 is BEFORE ISS date 03/01/2023 — fundamental impossibility (a card cannot expire 24 years before it was issued). Other tells not in tampered: DD field is all zeros (0000000000000000) — clearly invalid as a real Document Discriminator, but technically passes D.4's literal 'present and distinct from DL number' check. ID number 5242912532 is 10 digits and matches D.1 format. Reno NV 89501 is a valid Reno ZIP — address is internally consistent. Most security-feature, UV, barcode, and back-of-card checks are UNVERIFIABLE (no back image, no UV image, can't decode barcode, can't assess substrate from a 2D photo). DOB field partially obscured in the scan, so E.2 (EXP on birthday) and several M.* DOB cross-checks are UNVERIFIABLE. Source: Archive 2 / nevada_generated.photos_v3_0054541.png.
